recommendations.title: Don't Move
recommendations.overview: A grieving woman in a secluded forest encounters a killer who injects her with a paralytic drug. As her body shuts down, her fight for survival begins.

recommendations.title: Roar
recommendations.overview: Roar follows a family who are attacked by various African animals at the secluded home of their keeper.

recommendations.title: Kill Theory
recommendations.overview: While celebrating a graduation at a secluded vacation home, a group of college students find themselves targeted by a sadistic killer who forces them to play a deadly game of killing one another in order to survive.

recommendations.title: Infested
recommendations.overview: Residents of a rundown French apartment building battle against an army of deadly, rapidly reproducing spiders.

recommendations.title: Late Phases
recommendations.overview: When deadly attacks from a nearby forest beset a secluded retirement community, it is up to a blind army veteran to discover what the residents are hiding.

recommendations.title: Cockneys vs Zombies
recommendations.overview: A group of Cockneys arm themselves to rescue their elderly relative and his retirement home friends who are trapped and fighting off a zombie attack during a zombie apocalypse in the East End of London.

recommendations.title: Return
recommendations.overview: A young couple purchase their new home to start a life together, only to find out the elderly couple next door have other plans for them.

recommendations.title: A Simple Life
recommendations.overview: After suffering a stroke, an altruistic maid announces that she wants to quit her job and move into an old people's home.

recommendations.title: The Manor

recommendations.title: Bubba Ho-tep
